module_info.docstring: Tests for EvolveProblemLoop snapshot loading functionality.

functions.name: test_weighted_sampling_population_snapshot_loading
functions.docstring: Test that EvolveProblemLoop can load a WeightedSamplingPopulation snapshot.

functions.name: test_fixed_tree_population_snapshot_loading
functions.docstring: Test that EvolveProblemLoop can load a FixedTreePopulation snapshot.

functions.name: test_evolve_problem_loop_initialization_weighted_sampling
functions.docstring: Test that EvolveProblemLoop initializes correctly with weighted sampling parameters.

functions.name: test_evolve_problem_loop_initialization_fixed_tree
functions.docstring: Test that EvolveProblemLoop initializes correctly with fixed tree parameters.

functions.name: test_evolve_problem_loop_initialization_conflicting_midpoint
functions.docstring: Test that initialization fails with both fixed and percentile midpoint scores.

functions.name: test_run_single_iteration
functions.docstring: Test running a single evolution iteration.

functions.name: test_run_multiple_iterations
functions.docstring: Test running multiple evolution iterations.

functions.name: test_run_zero_iterations
functions.docstring: Test that running zero iterations raises an error.

functions.name: test_run_negative_iterations
functions.docstring: Test that running negative iterations raises an error.

functions.name: test_iteration_snapshot_contents
functions.docstring: Test that IterationSnapshot contains all expected fields.

functions.name: test_snapshot_after_resume
functions.docstring: Test that snapshots can be taken and resumed multiple times.

functions.name: test_snapshot_invalid_format
functions.docstring: Test that loading an invalid snapshot raises an error.

functions.name: test_initialize_evolver_default_parameters
functions.docstring: Test that evolver initialization uses default parameters when not specified.

functions.name: test_initialize_evolver_custom_parameters
functions.docstring: Test that evolver initialization uses custom parameters when specified.

functions.name: test_initialize_evolver_fixed_midpoint_score
functions.docstring: Test evolver initialization with fixed midpoint score.

functions.name: test_snapshot_parameter_override
functions.docstring: Test that explicit parameters override snapshot parameters on resume.

functions.name: test_fixed_tree_parameter_override
functions.docstring: Test that fixed_children_per_generation can be overridden on resume.

functions.name: test_learning_log_view_type_applied
functions.docstring: Test that the learning_log_view_type is properly applied to the evolver.

functions.name: test_mutator_context_set
functions.docstring: Test that mutators receive the population context during initialization.

functions.name: test_run_increments_iteration_counter
functions.docstring: Test that the iteration counter increments correctly.

functions.name: test_run_without_initialization
functions.docstring: Test that run() initializes evolver if not already initialized.

functions.name: test_population_json_log_in_snapshot
functions.docstring: Test that population JSON log is included in iteration snapshots.

functions.name: test_score_percentiles_in_snapshot
functions.docstring: Test that score percentiles are computed and included in snapshots.

functions.name: test_best_organism_in_snapshot
functions.docstring: Test that the best organism is correctly identified in snapshots.

functions.name: test_use_process_pool_executors
functions.docstring: Test that use_process_pool_executors parameter is passed to evolver.

functions.name: test_load_snapshot_with_unrecognized_population_class
functions.docstring: Test that loading a snapshot with an unrecognized population class raises an error.

functions.name: test_multiple_consecutive_runs
functions.docstring: Test that run() can be called multiple times consecutively.

functions.name: test_batch_size_parameter
functions.docstring: Test that batch_size parameter is properly stored and passed to evolver.

functions.name: test_should_verify_mutations_parameter
functions.docstring: Test that should_verify_mutations parameter is properly stored and passed to evolver.

functions.name: test_evolver_stats_in_initial_snapshot
functions.docstring: Test that evolver stats in initial snapshot have correct evaluate count.

functions.name: test_fixed_midpoint_score_with_no_percentile
functions.docstring: Test that using fixed_midpoint_score results in None for midpoint_score_percentile.

functions.name: test_resume_with_fixed_midpoint_score_override
functions.docstring: Test that resuming with fixed_midpoint_score overrides the snapshot value.

functions.name: test_snapshot_serialization_round_trip
functions.docstring: Test that snapshot can be serialized and deserialized correctly.

functions.name: test_mutator_context_updated_on_resume
functions.docstring: Test that mutators receive updated context when resuming from snapshot.

functions.name: test_population_size_increases_over_iterations
functions.docstring: Test that population size generally increases over iterations.
